solutions.solution: (b) Each letter is coded with its opposite letter. Let us see As, NATURE → MZGFIV. Similarly, ANSWER → ZMHDVI
(c) Each letter is coded three letters forward. As, RATIONAL → UDWLRQDO. Similarly, NOFM → QRUP
(d) Coded with corresponding position of letters. As, TREND → 20185144. Similarly, SMART → 191311820
(b) Here, CONFI → GURE (Reverse order). Similarly, ADVER → TISE. ∴ ADVERTISE → TISEREVDA
(d) As, SYNDICATE → SYTENDCAI. Similarly, PSYCHOTIC → PSICYCOTH
(c) Each letter is coded with the position of its opposite letter. As, KAMAL → 16 26 13 1 12 → PZNZO. Similarly, NO → 13 12 → ML. ∴ NO → 1312
(c) Each letter is coded with its right and left letters. As, NINE → OMHD. Similarly, LOT → MKPNUS
(c) As, QUIET → 7 18 5 5 14 → GREEN. Similarly, XLS → VIOLET
